heading: Today
text: Periods of rain this morning, possibly a thunderstorm west of the Green Mountains, tapering to showers this afternoon.  Highs in the 40s from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, upper 30s in Quebec, and 50s to low 60s south.  Light winds, mainly east from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, to south for areas south of Rt. 4, near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of rain and showers, possibly a thunderstorm.  Some freezing rain near and north of the Quebec border.  Quite mild south.  Lows in the 30s to low 40s north, 40s and 50s south.  Winds east in northern areas, south to southwest in southern areas 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: Rain or showers likely in the morning, some freezing rain near and north of the Quebec border, tapering off midday and afternoon.  Highs in the 40s from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, upper 30s near and north of the Quebec border, but mid 50s to mid 60s going south.  Winds shifting to the northwest, then north near 10 mph.
